accepted.reason: Polygon-mask coverage and validity aggregation loops are strong geospatial array-processing kernels.
Structured-grid and random point generation in hypercubes is useful geometry sampling logic.
Bisection root finding over parameterized quartics is a compact numerical solver kernel.
Recursive memoized weighted edit distance provides high-signal dynamic-programming structure.
Iterative particle coordinate updates with per-particle angular dynamics are strong simulation loops.
Kalman filtering and log-likelihood accumulation are practical time-series inference kernels.
Dummy-variable interaction matrix construction is a compact combinatorial encoding kernel.

skipped.reason: Cython language/runtime conversion tests are not standalone optimization targets.
Mostly thin SciPy minimize wiring around project-specific economic objective and external parameters.
scikit-learn internal tree wrapper glue is integration-heavy and not broadly reusable as conversion data.
Evented network transport state machine is framework/protocol glue rather than numerical optimization logic.
